provenance.source_classification: owner seller listing; real marketplace photo; privacy-minimized footer crop

retention.basis: The source is the repository owner's Yujin's Pokestop listing and this exact privacy-minimized crop was already retained in the repository with an explicit bounded regression-retention basis.

authority: collector number is directly human-visible in the printed footer
existing source provenance records an independent exact catalog cross-check
card name is not evaluated as direct text in this footer-only benchmark

known_failure_category: local OCR on the retained crop reads only a partial collector token; frozen deep-sweep trace contains the exact token
